name: per-UDID simulator locking > refuses to steal a live lock owned by another session
fullName: com.blockether.spel.ios-test.per-UDID simulator locking.refuses to steal a live lock owned by another session

labels.name: testMethod
labels.value: refuses to steal a live lock owned by another session

testMethod: refuses to steal a live lock owned by another session

steps.name: refuses to steal a live lock owned by another session
expect: (try (sut/acquire-lock! udid "sess-b") false (catch clojure.lang.ExceptionInfo e (str/includes? (.getMessage e) "locked by spel session 'sess-a'")))

testCase.name: per-UDID simulator locking > refuses to steal a live lock owned by another session
testCase.fullName: com.blockether.spel.ios-test.per-UDID simulator locking.refuses to steal a live lock owned by another session
